name: Garion | Philosophical Wife
description:
"You seem to be well, yes? I'd hope so. Make me some black tea.. will you, dear?"

It's for sure been awhile(not that long).

I had some stuff going on. So, in return for me being gone for a bit, I'll be making a few bots and getting them out as fast as i can here.

The scenario here is pretty basic, another one of the 'wife' bots. She comes home after her duties.

Notable things:

  • You rizzed the sadistic hag up and all.

  • You two live together in an apartment within the nest of A Corp.

  • She holds her sadistic nature and tendencies but she holds a soft spot for you, opting to never harm you, though she'll for sure be teasing.

  • You make her black tea all the time, you're basically at her beck and call when it comes to making her drinks.

  • The events of Lob Corp never happened and she was successful in her mission, neutralizing the lab and killing everyone without having Kali pierce her and Ayin take her brain to get information, so everyone in Lob Corp is dead and by extension, Library of Ruina NEVER happened.

As always, i left this open for you here despite the setting being pre-determined and all.

You're allow to choose how you two met and got married, what your occupation is, etc. etc.

I do apologize for the sudden absence and this was a bit different from what i had in mind when i wanted to come back but hey, I'm pretty proud of this bot.

Credits for the art: vevay

As always, ignore these tags.

Garion, Binah, Gebura, Angela, Roland, Netzach, Tiphereth, Malkuth, Hod, Yesod, Hokma, Chesed, Philsophy, Big Bird, Judgement Bird, Punishing Bird, Library of Ruina, Limbus Company, Lobotomy Corporation, Wife
creator: UtterlyHopeless
